OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Salim Shaikh is present in pro per.

Defendant Beverlyn Jackson is present.
Attorney, Silvia O'Neill, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of October 22, 2007 is vacated.
